title: Skills Assessments for Hiring | Vervoe
text:
Skills Assessments for Hiring | Vervoe

Assessments that validate capability - not proxy signals. · Most assessment tools test knowledge. Vervoe tests capability. · Real candidates, qualified on demonstrated skills · Merit, not background · Explainable, every time · Built for scale · The evidence that flows through everything · Validated skills profile built · Candidate-specific questions generated · References targeted to what surfaced · Start in minutes. Build anything. · Start from the library · Generate from a JD · Build from scratch · Test skills in context · Written response · Video response · Code challenges · Spreadsheet tasks · Audio response · File upload · Multiple choice · Presentation mode · Built for integrity at every stage · Independently bias-audited · Anti-cheating without friction · Quality of hire, measured · See the assessments that turn hiring into a decision you can defend.

AssessmentsAssessments that validate capability - not proxy signals.Role-specific skills assessments, powered by explainable AI, built on real job tasks. The core of Vervoe’s skills intelligence layer.Book a demoBrowse the libraryMarketing Manager - Skills AssessmentQuestion 2 of 5Content StrategyYou’ve been given a product launch with a $15k content budget and 6 weeks. Walk us through how you’d prioritise channels and create an editorial calendar.Your answer here…Written responseVideoSpreadsheetCodeAudioFile upload12:34 remainingNext questionWhat a Vervoe assessment actually isMost assessment tools test knowledge. Vervoe tests capability.Every assessment is built on the tasks a person would actually do in the role - not a personality proxy, not a psychometric ratio, not a trivia round dressed up as an evaluation. The candidate does the work. Vervoe grades the work. Your team sees the evidence.That’s the difference between a score and a signal.Real candidates, qualified on demonstrated skillsYour team only sees candidates who’ve actually proven they can do the role - not those who look good on paper.Merit, not backgroundSkills-based evaluation removes the advantage of a polished CV or a prestigious university. The work is the proof.Explainable, every timeEvery score links back to the evidence that produced it - defensible to candidates, hiring managers, and legal.Built for scaleWorks for companies processing thousands of applications and for roles where there’s only one candidate in the pool.How assessments power the platformThe evidence that flows through everythingThe assessment is where the skills intelligence layer gets its evidence. What gets captured here flows into every subsequent stage - making each one smarter.Skills AssessmentValidated skills profile builtRole-specific evidence captured. Every response graded. Candidate ranked by demonstrated ability.Interview SchedulingCandidate-specific questions generatedAssessment data generates interview questions. Interviewers walk in informed. No cold starts.Reference ChecksReferences targeted to what surfacedReferences confirm the hire with evidence, not instinct. Targeted to skills gaps the assessment found.Three ways to build oneStart in minutes. Build anything.Start from the library300+ assessments authored by I/O psychologists, across 10 categories and hundreds of roles. Validated, ready to launch in minutes. No setup required.Browse the libraryGenerate from a JDThe Assessment Builder turns a job description into a role-specific assessment - three skill groups of three questions each, mixing validated content with AI-generated items. Your JD. Our AI.Try the builderBuild from scratchDesign custom assessments for roles that don’t fit a template. Your scoring criteria, validated against the model. Full control over question types, skill groups, and weighting.See all featuresImmersive question typesTest skills in contextOur skills assessments use immersive question types that bring your role to life - helping you engage and test the true ability of your candidates across every medium the role requires.Written responseLong or short-form text answers evaluated by AI against millions of benchmarks.Video responseCandidates record video answers to structured questions. Authentic, engaging, scalable.Code challengesLive coding environments with automated test runners. Real output. Real evaluation.Spreadsheet tasksCandidates work in real spreadsheet environments. Upload, analyse, build.Audio responseRecord spoken answers. Great for communication and language proficiency assessment.File uploadSubmit portfolios, designs, documents or any file type. Evaluate real deliverables.Multiple choiceRandomised options with answer-level randomisation. Eliminates answer-sharing between candidates.Presentation modeWatch candidates present live from a deck they’ve just created. See them pitch in real time.Fair by designBuilt for integrity at every stageIndependently bias-auditedThird-party validated by Holistic AI. Fairer hiring. Results openly published. Skills-based evaluation removes the advantage of background, name, or alma mater.Anti-cheating without frictionAuthenticity signals that don’t turn the experience hostile. Candidate experience stays human. Integrity stays intact. Randomisation, plagiarism detection, geolocation checks - all under the hood.Quality of hire, measured~120 days after hire, the platform checks performance and feeds the data back into the AI. Pre-hire evaluation improves because it learns from real-world outcomes - not just assessment completions.See the assessments that turn hiring into a decision you can defend.Role-specific. Explainable. Built on real work. Every score traceable to the evidence that produced it.Book a demoBrowse the Assessment Library
